case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1136 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 10720/2016 3. For Katcha Peshi. 01.11.2016. None present for the petitioner. It appears that after filing the petition, petitioner has not pursued the instant matter as on last date of hearing also no one was there for the petitioner and matter was adjourned with a note of caution. Office has raised objection with regard to maintainability of instant petition as well. Be that as it may, it is now almost 12:50 p.m. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest to pursue the matter and consequently, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE
